https://www.purewow.com/home/best-scente.description: Here, find a definitive ranking of the best scented candles of 2023 that will make your home smell like heaven on earth—including Le Labo, Diptyque, Voluspa, Capri Blue and so much more. Plus, some info on what to keep in mind while you’re shopping.

https://www.jomalone.com/product/25969/9.title: Lime Basil & Mandarin Home Candle | Jo Malone London | Jo Malone London
https://www.jomalone.com/product/25969/9.description:
Float away on a cool tropical breeze. Peppery basil and aromatic white thyme bring an unexpected twist to the scent of limes. Crafted in the English countryside in a signature glass design.

This fragrance is part of our fresh and energising home edit. The scents in this edit feature notes that are bright, zesty and invigorating – perfect for sprucing and working from home.

https://voluspa.com/products/baltic-ambe.title: Baltic Amber - Classic Candle & Refill
https://voluspa.com/products/baltic-ambe.description: Provide endless hours of the warm scent of Baltic Amber with our candle and candle refill bundle. Made with our long-lasting coconut wax blend.
